statement: A uniform slender rod AB of mass 5 kg and length 1.0 m is pinned at end A and released from rest in a horizontal position. Find the angular acceleration immediately after release, and the pin reaction at A. Use g = 9.81 m/s². I_A = (1/3)·m·L².
common_student_errors: Using I_G (about center) when the pin is at end A, rather than I_A = (1/3)·m·L²
Applying ΣFy = 0 (statics) instead of ΣFy = m·a_Gy (dynamics) when finding pin reactions
Computing the pin reaction as simply Ay = mg without accounting for the centripetal/tangential acceleration of the center of mass
